questions.question: Which week introduced multi-agent systems?
options: Multi-agent systems were not covered in this course
questions.explanation: Week 3 (Days 15-21) covered advanced patterns including multi-agent architectures, communication patterns, production safety, and the capstone project.

questions.question: The ReAct pattern, PDA Loop, and function calling are all concepts from:
options: They were introduced across all three weeks equally
questions.explanation: These are foundational concepts introduced in Week 1 (Days 1-7) to establish how agents think, perceive, decide, and act before diving into implementation.

questions.question: What is the capstone project in this course?
options: A multi-agent content creation pipeline with Research, Writer, and Editor agents
A fine-tuned LLM for a specific domain
A single-agent web scraper with memory
questions.explanation: The capstone (Days 18-21) brings all three weeks together: a multi-agent pipeline where a Coordinator directs Research, Writer, and Editor agents to produce polished content.
